title: Cipher Speaks
theme: one of the Twins surfaces and gives a speech; the other does not surface
worldEvent: Cipher gives a public address in Hollow Market; the speech is recorded by the Choristers
narratorPromptFragment: The current world-chapter is BOOK III, CHAPTER 2: CIPHER SPEAKS. Cipher (one of the Twins) gave a public speech in Hollow Market this week. The Choristers recorded it; the recording disagrees subtly with what people who heard the speech remember. Cinder did not appear. Reference Cipher only — never Cinder — unless the player asks specifically.
